summary: Adjusted the closing beats to align more cleanly with Chapter 10's morning-after setup while preserving the chapter's existing financial and emotional turns.
edits: Moved Eli's 'That's a lot of woman' text earlier in the evening so the later load-out message can be Lena's last pre-sleep contact.
Changed Lena's night wrap-up to leave the laptop and half-done caption file open, matching the next chapter's opening image.
Added the coiled-cable photo, load-out delay text, and one-earbud wait to strengthen the Chapter 9 to Chapter 10 handoff.
